div.phpdebugbar-widgets-mails span.phpdebugbar-widgets-subject { display: block; } div.phpdebugbar-widgets-mails li.phpdebugbar-widgets-list-item pre.phpdebugbar-widgets-headers { display: none; margin: 10px; padding: 5px; border: 1px solid var(--debugbar-border); font-family: var(--debugbar-font-mono); }
